title: Survey confirms the struggle of working parents: 'No way to be two things at once'
description: A new Pew survey finds many working parents feel they cannot give 100% at either work or home. Benefits like paid sick leave and more affordable childcare could help.
text: Cliff Jette for NPR Amber Petersen's struggles are. Likely familiar to any working parent. Some days at work, she finds herself diverted to family matters. She needs to leave work immediately. Other days, she wishes she could be chaperoning. A field trip instead of scheduling meetings and. Putting together files at the small law firm. In Mason City, Iowa, where she works as a legal assistant.
thai_text: ข่าวนี้จาก NPR อยู่ในหมวดธุรกิจและเศรษฐกิจ หัวข้อคือ “Survey confirms the struggle of working parents: 'No way to be two things at once'”. ใจความหลักคือ Cliff Jette for NPR Amber Petersen's struggles are. Likely familiar to any working parent. Some days at work, she finds herself diverted to family matters. She needs to leave work immediately. สรุปง่าย ๆ คือข่าวนี้เล่าว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้น ใครเกี่ยวข้อง และทำไมเรื่องนี้จึงควรติดตามต่อ. คำสำคัญที่ควรรู้: affordable = คำว่า affordable / amber = คำว่า amber / assistant = คำว่า assistant / benefits = คำว่า benefits / cannot = คำว่า cannot.
